description_long: This chest of drawers features a rectangular, blocky form with a natural wood finish on its vertical faces, displaying visible wood grain and knots for a rustic appearance. The top surface is covered in a layer of greenish-yellow moss or lichen, giving it an aged, weathered look as if it has been left outdoors for some time. Scattered across the top are small, colorful circular objects, possibly buttons or tokens, adding a playful or accidental touch. The front, sides, and back all show horizontal wooden planks, but there are no visible handles, drawer seams, or other interactive features on any face. The overall construction appears solid and robust, with no visible legs or base, and the object sits flat on the ground. The lack of visible drawers or handles suggests a minimalist or possibly sealed design, blending utilitarian function with a natural, reclaimed aesthetic.
description: A blocky chest of drawers with a rustic wood finish and a mossy, weathered top, accented by scattered colorful tokens. No visible handles or drawer seams are present, giving it a minimalist, reclaimed look.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat wooden face with horizontal planks and subtle wood grain, topped by a mossy surface with scattered colored tokens.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the same wooden plank texture and mossy top, with a slightly different arrangement of the colored tokens visible.
description_view_2: The back view continues the wood plank pattern and mossy top, with fewer visible colored tokens and no additional features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the wood grain, mossy top, and a few colored tokens, maintaining the blocky, solid appearance.
